description: Public upstream source registry for the integrated full-fidelity campaign. Entries identify acquisition and parity targets; they are not accepted parity artifacts until converted into repository-local JSON/NPZ artifacts that satisfy full_fidelity_artifact_schema.json.

sources.required_action: Acquire redistribution-permitted nonlinear 5D GENE benchmark decks and output artifacts, then map heat flux, zonal flow, saturation, and electromagnetic observables into the full-fidelity artifact schema.
Acquire public CGYRO nonlinear electromagnetic benchmark inputs and outputs, preserve provenance/license metadata, and compare against native 5D nonlinear GK artifacts.
Acquire GS2 nonlinear benchmark decks and output artifacts, then gate native nonlinear GK heat-flux spectra and field-energy histories against declared thresholds.

Ingest DREAM example or publication decks, run or acquire kinetic outputs, and map f_p_xi_t, runaway current, avalanche growth, synchrotron, bremsstrahlung, and partial-screening observables into the full-fidelity artifact schema.
Ingest Aurora impurity transport examples and ADAS-backed outputs, then compare charge-state densities, total density, line radiation, ionisation, and recombination source/sink matrices.
Ingest FreeGS free-boundary coil-current examples, run strict backend comparisons, and preserve coil, limiter, X-point, and GEQDSK provenance.
Ingest evolutive free-boundary examples with machine coil metadata for strict native coil/vacuum reconstruction comparisons.
